entries.title: NEET: Cell Theory
entries.hook: NEET topper secret: master this concept:
explanations: All living organisms are composed of cells. The cell is the basic structural and functional unit of life. All cells arise from pre-existing cells. Proposed by Schleiden, Schwann, and Virchow.
Contains genetic material (DNA) surrounded by double membrane nuclear envelope with pores. Nucleolus is site of ribosome synthesis.
Exchange of genetic material between homologous chromosomes in prophase I of meiosis. Increases genetic variation. Occurs at chiasmata.
Angle of incidence = angle of reflection. Mirror formula: 1/f = 1/u + 1/v. Concave: real/inverted. Convex: virtual/upright.

entries.title: NEET: Ohm's Law
entries.hook: This concept is a must-know for NEET:
explanations: V = IR. Current proportional to voltage at constant temperature. Resistance depends on material, length, cross-section, temperature.
Junction rule: sum of currents entering = sum leaving. Loop rule: sum of potential differences in closed loop = 0.
Groups 13-18. Boron family to noble gases. Variable oxidation states. Trends in metallic character, ionization energy, electronegativity down groups.
Gas: no fixed shape/volume. Liquid: fixed volume, no shape. Solid: fixed shape and volume. Ideal gas law: PV = nRT. Real gases deviate at high pressure.

entries.title: NEET: Hardy-Weinberg Principle
entries.hook: Stop missing this question in mock tests:
explanations: Allele frequencies constant without evolutionary forces. p2 + 2pq + q2 = 1. Affected by mutation, gene flow, drift, selection, non-random mating.
First: elliptical orbits with Sun at focus. Second: equal areas in equal time. Third: T2 proportional to a3.
Enthalpy H = U + PV. Exothermic: dH negative. Endothermic: dH positive. Gibbs free energy dG = dH - TdS. Spontaneous when dG negative.
Transition metals (d-block): variable oxidation states, colored compounds, catalytic properties. Lanthanoids and actinoids (f-block): inner transition elements.

entries.title: NEET: Photosynthesis Light Reaction
entries.hook: High-yield topic for your NEET exam:
explanations: Occurs in thylakoids. Light splits water producing O2, ATP, NADPH. Photosystems I and II work in Z-scheme.
98.5% O2 bound to hemoglobin as oxyhemoglobin. 1.5% dissolved in plasma. Each hemoglobin carries 4 O2. Dissociation curve is sigmoid.
In fluid flow, higher velocity = lower pressure. Explains airplane lift, atomizer, venturi meter. P + 0.5pv2 + pgh = constant.

entries.title: NEET: Mendel's Laws
entries.hook: This concept is a must-know for NEET:
explanations: Segregation: alleles separate in gametes. Independent Assortment: genes on different chromosomes assort independently. Dominance: dominant allele masks recessive.
Junction rule: sum of currents entering = sum leaving. Loop rule: sum of potential differences in closed loop = 0.
Enthalpy H = U + PV. Exothermic: dH negative. Endothermic: dH positive. Gibbs free energy dG = dH - TdS. Spontaneous when dG negative.
Carbonyl group C=O. Aldehydes: terminal carbonyl. Ketones: internal. Nucleophilic addition reactions. Fehling's test distinguishes aldehydes.

Rutherford: nucleus at center with electrons orbiting. Bohr: quantized energy levels. Thomson: plum pudding model. Chadwick: discovered neutron.

Oscillating electric and magnetic fields perpendicular to each other and direction of propagation. Speed = c = 3e8 m/s. Light is EM wave. Chemical Kinetics. Rate of reaction = d[conc]/dt. Order: sum of exponents in rate law. Activation energy: minimum energy for reaction. Catalyst lowers activation energy.

F = G(m1m2)/r2. G = 6.67e-11 Nm2/kg2. g = 9.8 m/s2 on Earth. g varies with altitude, depth, latitude.

Groups 13-18. Boron family to noble gases. Variable oxidation states. Trends in metallic character, ionization energy, electronegativity down groups.

entries.title: NEET: Crossing Over
entries.hook: NEET aspirants, listen up:
explanations: Exchange of genetic material between homologous chromosomes in prophase I of meiosis. Increases genetic variation. Occurs at chiasmata.
Glomerular filtration 125 mL/min. Tubular reabsorption 99%. Tubular secretion. ADH increases water reabsorption. Aldosterone increases Na+ reabsorption.
Action potential triggers Ca2+ influx. Neurotransmitters released, bind to receptors on postsynaptic membrane causing excitation or inhibition.
-COOH group. Weak acids. Reactions: esterification, reduction, decarboxylation. Acetic acid most common. Formic acid in ant venom.

Double helix. Nucleotides: phosphate, deoxyribose, base (A,T,G,C). A=T (2 bonds), G≡C (3 bonds). Antiparallel strands.

entries.title: NEET: Cell Theory
entries.hook: Master this NEET concept once and for all:
explanations: All living organisms are composed of cells. The cell is the basic structural and functional unit of life. All cells arise from pre-existing cells. Proposed by Schleiden, Schwann, and Virchow.
Contains genetic material (DNA) surrounded by double membrane nuclear envelope with pores. Nucleolus is site of ribosome synthesis.
Junction rule: sum of currents entering = sum leaving. Loop rule: sum of potential differences in closed loop = 0.
Carbonyl group C=O. Aldehydes: terminal carbonyl. Ketones: internal. Nucleophilic addition reactions. Fehling's test distinguishes aldehydes.

entries.title: NEET: Cell Theory
entries.hook: High-yield topic for your NEET exam:
explanations: All living organisms are composed of cells. The cell is the basic structural and functional unit of life. All cells arise from pre-existing cells. Proposed by Schleiden, Schwann, and Virchow.
Inducible operon. Lactose absent: repressor blocks transcription. Lactose present: binds repressor, allows lac gene transcription.
Snell's law: n1sin(i) = n2sin(r). Light bends toward normal in denser medium. Refractive index n = c/v. Total internal reflection above critical angle.
Gas: no fixed shape/volume. Liquid: fixed volume, no shape. Solid: fixed shape and volume. Ideal gas law: PV = nRT. Real gases deviate at high pressure.

Inspiration: diaphragm contracts, intercostal muscles lift ribs. Expiration: passive relaxation. Intrapleural pressure changes drive air flow.
Carbon: photosynthesis + respiration. Nitrogen: fixation, nitrification, assimilation, ammonification, denitrification. Water: evaporation, condensation, precipitation.
Alkanes: CnH2n+2, saturated. Alkenes: CnH2n, unsaturated. Alkynes: CnH2n-2. Aromatic: benzene ring. Combustion, substitution, addition reactions.

entries.title: NEET: Crossing Over
entries.hook: Stop missing this question in mock tests:
explanations: Exchange of genetic material between homologous chromosomes in prophase I of meiosis. Increases genetic variation. Occurs at chiasmata.
Entropy of universe always increases. Heat cannot spontaneously flow from cold to hot. Perpetual motion machines impossible.
Angle of incidence = angle of reflection. Mirror formula: 1/f = 1/u + 1/v. Concave: real/inverted. Convex: virtual/upright.
1/f = 1/v - 1/u. Power P = 1/f (diopters). Convex: converging, positive power. Concave: diverging, negative power. Lens maker's formula.

entries.title: NEET: ECG Waves
entries.hook: NEET aspirants, listen up:
explanations: P wave: atrial depolarization. QRS: ventricular depolarization. T wave: ventricular repolarization. Records electrical activity of heart.
Gene inserted into vector. Vector introduced to host. Host expresses desired protein. Used for insulin, growth hormone, vaccines.
Conductivity between conductor and insulator. Doping: adding impurities. n-type: extra electrons. p-type: holes. PN junction: diode.
Electrochemical cells convert chemical to electrical energy. Anode: oxidation. Cathode: reduction. EMF = Ered(cathode) - Ered(anode). Nernst equation.

entries.title: NEET: Endocrine Glands
entries.hook: NEET aspirants, listen up:
explanations: Hypothalamus controls pituitary. Thyroid: metabolism. Parathyroid: calcium. Adrenal: stress. Pancreas: blood sugar. Gonads: reproduction.
In fluid flow, higher velocity = lower pressure. Explains airplane lift, atomizer, venturi meter. P + 0.5pv2 + pgh = constant.
Mixing of atomic orbitals to form equivalent hybrid orbitals. sp (linear), sp2 (trigonal planar), sp3 (tetrahedral). Explains bond angles.
Addition polymers: polyethylene, PVC, polystyrene. Condensation polymers: nylon, polyester, proteins. Natural: rubber, cellulose. Synthetic: plastics, fibers.

entries.title: NEET: CO2 Transport
entries.hook: This keeps appearing in NEET papers:
explanations: 70% as bicarbonate ions. 20-25% as carbaminohemoglobin. 7% dissolved in plasma. Transported from tissues to lungs.
Insulin lowers blood glucose. Glucagon raises it. Diabetes mellitus from insulin deficiency or resistance.
Oxidation: loss of electrons. Reduction: gain of electrons. Oxidizing agent accepts electrons. Reducing agent donates electrons. Balancing half-reactions.
Rate of reaction = d[conc]/dt. Order: sum of exponents in rate law. Activation energy: minimum energy for reaction. Catalyst lowers activation energy.

entries.title: NEET: Cell Theory
entries.hook: NEET topper secret: master this concept:
explanations: All living organisms are composed of cells. The cell is the basic structural and functional unit of life. All cells arise from pre-existing cells. Proposed by Schleiden, Schwann, and Virchow.
First: inertia. Second: F=ma. Third: action-reaction. Inertia resists change in motion.
Enthalpy H = U + PV. Exothermic: dH negative. Endothermic: dH positive. Gibbs free energy dG = dH - TdS. Spontaneous when dG negative.
Transition metals (d-block): variable oxidation states, colored compounds, catalytic properties. Lanthanoids and actinoids (f-block): inner transition elements.

entries.title: NEET: Prokaryotic vs Eukaryotic
entries.hook: High-yield topic for your NEET exam:
explanations: Prokaryotes lack a membrane-bound nucleus. Eukaryotes have a true nucleus and membrane-bound organelles. Bacteria are prokaryotes; plants, animals, fungi are eukaryotes.
Mitosis: 2 identical diploid cells for growth. Meiosis: 4 non-identical haploid gametes with two divisions. Meiosis creates genetic variation.
Crassulacean acid metabolism. Stomata open at night to fix CO2 into malate. Day: CO2 released for Calvin cycle. Adaptation for arid conditions.
Insulin lowers blood glucose. Glucagon raises it. Diabetes mellitus from insulin deficiency or resistance.

entries.title: NEET: Biotechnology Tools
entries.hook: Most students get this wrong in NEET:
explanations: Restriction enzymes cut DNA. Vectors: plasmids, viruses. PCR amplifies DNA. Gel electrophoresis separates. Sequencing reads genetic code.
Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only converted. Total mechanical energy (KE+PE) constant without non-conservative forces.
Polymers of amino acids. Peptide bonds link amino acids. Primary: sequence. Secondary: alpha helix, beta sheet. Tertiary: 3D folding. Quaternary: multiple subunits.
Addition polymers: polyethylene, PVC, polystyrene. Condensation polymers: nylon, polyester, proteins. Natural: rubber, cellulose. Synthetic: plastics, fibers.
